channel.title: Zheaoli/awesome-coins Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

    • CryptoCurrencyHub
    • Build Blockchain
    • Hackernoon's

      • Bitcoin
      • Coin & Crypto
      • Daniel Jeffries

item.title: Zheaoli/awesome-coins Mar 13th, 2018
item.description:
☤ Coin Market Tools & Utilities

  • CoinScanner.co — Gives you multiple trade routes from 1 crypto to another.

item.title: Zheaoli/awesome-coins Oct 11th, 2017
item.description:
☤ Reading Material

  • r/CryptoCurrency — Official subreddit about crypto-currencies and crypto-assets.

item.title: Zheaoli/awesome-coins Sep 22nd, 2017
item.description:
☤ Coin Market Tools & Utilities

  • CoinMarketCap — Shows all currencies on a real-time dashboard.

    • ☤ Reading Material

  • Blockchain for humansstars14 — Ultra-simplified blockchain explanation (in construction).

    • ☤ Coin Mining Pools

  • #: https://www.nicehash.com/ — Mine any algo (optimized for your GPU) & get paid in BTC.

    • ☤ Hashing Power for Rent

  • NiceHash — Supports all popular algos, pay in BTC for raw throughput.
  • BitMain Hosted — Looks complicated and sketchy, but they offer hosted ASIC solutions.

    • ☤ Coin Exchanges

  • Cryptopia — Wallets for all currencies, trading to/from all currencies.
  • Shapeshift — The fastest exchange on Earth.
  • Bittrex — Wallets for all currencies, trading to/from all currencies.

    • ☤ Windows GUI Apps

  • NiceHash Miner — Resells your GPU/CPU to miners for profit! Benchmarks all algos against your hardware, and automatically picks the most profitable configuration (adjustable).

    • ☤ MacOS GUI Apps

  • MacMiner — Wraps bfgminer, cgminer, and sgminer in a GUI.

    • ☤ MacOS CLI Apps

  • nheqminerstars82 — Equihash CPU & GPU miner.

    • ☤ Recommended Hardware

  • NVidia GTX 1080 TI OC — The most powerful consumer graphics card in the world.
  • Asrock H110 Pro BTC+ Mining Motherboard — Can apparently host 12x PCI-E GPUs.

    • ☤ Cool Coin/Blockchain Stuff

  • bcoin — Bitcoin fullnode implementation written entirely in Node.js that you can even run in a browser, includes wallet, mempool, chain, and mining.
  • Tezos — Self-healing blockchain.
  • Tendermint — Byzantine fault-tolerant replicated state machines in any programming language.
  • Cosmos — Network and a framework for interoperability between blockchains.
  • Blockply — Collection of the most interesting and outstanding blockchain projects
  • Blockchain demostars3.4k — Web-based demonstration of blockchain concepts.

item.title: Zheaoli/awesome-coins Aug 29th, 2017
item.description:
☤ Reading Material

  • Map of Coins – Explore the visualized history of the cryptocurrencies, from their whitepapers up to present days.

    • ☤ Hashing Power for Rent

  • Bitcoin.com Pool — I've heard good things.

item.title: Zheaoli/awesome-coins Aug 28th, 2017
item.description:
☤ Support Causes You Care About

    • ☤ Reading Material

  • Overview of Cryptocurrenciesstars388 — GitHub Repo.

item.title: Zheaoli/awesome-coins Aug 27th, 2017
item.description:
☤ Coin Market Tools & Utilities

  • Coinbin.org — Human–friendly API for quickly getting coin data (exchange rates, predictions, &c.)
    • List of All Known Coins /coins
    • BTC Current Value /btc
    • BTC Daily Historical Value /btc/history
    • BTC / ETH Exchange Rate /btc/to/eth
    • 20.01 BTC Value /btc/20.01
    • 42 ETH Value in BTC /eth/42/to/btc
    • Supports all crypto–currencies.

    • ☤ Cool Coin/Blockchain Stuff

  • BTC Mempol and Fee Explorer

item.title: Zheaoli/awesome-coins Aug 26th, 2017
item.description:
☤ Coin Exchanges

  • Qvolta — Sell and buy crypto assets around the world for local payment methods.

item.title: Zheaoli/awesome-coins Aug 25th, 2017
item.description:
☤ Coin Wallets

Physical Coin Wallets

  • Cryptosteel — Made of steel!

item.title: Zheaoli/awesome-coins Aug 24th, 2017

☤ Support Causes You Care About

  • Internet Archive BTC: 1Archive1n2C579dMsAu3iC6tWzuQJz8dN
  • Wikileaks BTC: 1HB5XMLmzFVj8ALj6mfBsbifRoD4miY36v
  • The Pirate Bay BTC: 129TQVAroeehD9fZpzK51NdZGQT4TqifbG
  • xkcd BTC: 14Tr4HaKkKuC1Lmpr2YMAuYVZRWqAdRTcr

item.title: Zheaoli/awesome-coins Aug 23rd, 2017
item.description:
☤ Cool Coin/Blockchain Stuff

  • Bitstars972 — Python’s fastest Bitcoin library with an API allowing transactions to be made in only 3 lines of code.
  • URI scheme for Blockchain exploration

    • ☤ Reading Material

  • A massive collection of white papers
  • Mastering Bitcoinstars16.2k (ebook)

    • ☤ Coin Wallets

    Hosted Coin Wallets

  • Coinbase BTC
  • Coinbase ETH
  • Coinbase LTC

    • ☤ Coin Mining Pools

  • SC: https://sia.nanopool.org/
  • PASC: https://pasc.nanopool.org/
  • XMR: https://xmr.nanopool.org/
  • ZEC: https://zec.nanopool.org/
  • ETC: https://etc.nanopool.org/
  • BTC: https://pool.bitcoin.com/
  • ETH: https://eth.nanopool.org/

    • ☤ Universal GUI Apps

  • Sia UI — SC wallet, file hosting, storage.
  • LBRY — LBRY wallet, media consumption & publishing platform.

    • ☤ MacOS CLI Apps

  • bfgminer — Modular ASIC/FPGA miner written in C, featuring overclocking, monitoring, fan speed control and remote interface capabilities.
  • cgminer — ASIC and FPGA miner in C for Bitcoin.
  • sgminer — Scrypt GPU miner.

    • ☤ Coin Wallets

    Coin Debit Cards

  • Cryptopay BTC Debit Card

    • ☤ Coin Wallets

    Physical Coin Wallets

  • Sia Paper Wallet

    • ☤ Algos supported by NiceHash Stratum Proxy

  • Scrypt (Litecoin / LTC)
  • SHA256 (Bitcoin / BTC)
  • ScryptNF (Scrypt-Adaptive-Nfactor) (GPU Coin, GPUC)
  • X11 (Dash / Darkcoin, Dashcoin, ASIC-Resistant)
  • X13 (MaruCoin / MARU) (CPU/GPU)
  • Keccak (MaxCoin / MAX)
  • X15 (HTML5 Coin, HTML5)
  • Nist5 (Talkcoin, TAC)
  • NeoScrypt (Phoenixcoin (PXC), Imperialcoin (IPC), Feathercoin (FTC), UFOcoin (UFO), Guncoin (GUN), Bollywoodcoin (BDC), Orbitcoin (ORB), Halcyon (HAL))
  • Lyra2RE (VertCoin / VTC, CryptoCoin)
  • WhirlpoolX (Vanillacoin / VNL)
  • Qubit (QuibitCoin / Q2C)
  • Quark (QRK)
  • Axiom (Axiom Coin / AXIOM)
  • Lyra2REv2 (VertCoin / VTC)
  • ScryptJaneNf16 (Diamond / DMD)
  • Blake256r8 (Blake Coin / BLC)
  • Blake256r14 (Blake Coin / BLC)
  • Blake256r8vnl (Blake Coin / BLC)
  • Hodl (HodlCoin / HODL)
  • DaggerHashimoto (Ethereum / ETH)
  • Decred (DCR)
  • CryptoNight (XCN, CPU-only)
  • Lbry (LBC)
  • Equihash (Zcash / XEC, ZClassic, HUSH, Komodo)
  • Pascal (PASC)
  • X11Gost (SIBCoin / SIB)
  • Sia (SC)
  • Blake2s (NevaCoin, Netko Coin, Verge, TajCoin)
  • Skunk (Signatum Coin / SIGT)

    • Find this useful?

  • BTC: 1Me2iXTJ91FYZhrGvaGaRDCBtnZ4KdxCug
  • ETH: 0x1321Ec9c7550a7c44ef3e583930556c6557411d1
  • LTC: Lbyje2eiSMPfE1Ux6BYJuzN9CS7Nj78Hpu
  • LBC: bYDCRLb2Pcp1V25sRZs1LJkVnaddsNVCAQ
  • SC: f23294ad70d2315f68a3265331508a44cd5363b8365f4ece91efd2365548b8f0760d34a8f884
